# [network-request] Pepperjam (Ascend)

**Network name:** Pepperjam, marketed as Ascend by Partnerize

**Slug:** `pepperjam`

**Publisher dashboard URL:** https://www.pepperjamnetwork.com/

**API documentation URL:** https://support.pepperjam.com/s/article/Publisher-API

**Account requirements:** Active Pepperjam publisher account, API key from
the account settings page.

**Why this is useful for publishers:** US-focused network with several
exclusive brand programmes. REST API is documented and stable. Tier-2 in
publisher demand but completes the picture for US-leaning sites.
